Package microui.core.style.theme

Class ThemeGlass

java.lang.Object
microui.core.style.theme.AbstractTheme
microui.core.style.theme.ThemeGlass
public class ThemeGlass extends AbstractTheme
Glass/transparent theme implementation with subtle animations and translucent effects. Provides a modern, semi-transparent aesthetic with animated lerp backgrounds and soft color transitions.

This theme features animated lerp backgrounds, translucent elements, and soft color palettes to create a "glass" or "frosted glass" visual effect. It includes looping animations for dynamic visual interest.

See Also:
  • AbstractTheme
  • Color
  • LerpedLoopColor

  • Method Details

    • getBackgroundColor

      public AbstractColor getBackgroundColor()
      Returns an animated looping lerp for the background. Transitions between light blue and white with transparency.
      Specified by:
      getBackgroundColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      looping lerp from light blue to white

    • getTextViewColor

      public AbstractColor getTextViewColor()
      Returns a near-white color with high opacity for text views.
      Specified by:
      getTextViewColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      very light gray with high opacity (255 luminance, 232 alpha)

    • getButtonTextColor

      public AbstractColor getButtonTextColor()
      Returns a light gray color for button text.
      Specified by:
      getButtonTextColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      light gray (200 luminance)

    • getStrokeColor

      public AbstractColor getStrokeColor()
      Returns a light blue-gray color for strokes with medium transparency.
      Specified by:
      getStrokeColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      light blue-gray with medium opacity (RGB: 224,224,255, alpha: 128)

    • getHoverColor

      public AbstractColor getHoverColor()
      Returns a semi-transparent cyan-blue for hover effects.
      Specified by:
      getHoverColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      cyan-blue with low opacity (RGB: 0,200,255, alpha: 32)

    • getRipplesColor

      public AbstractColor getRipplesColor()
      Returns a very transparent gray-blue for ripple animations.
      Specified by:
      getRipplesColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      gray-blue with very low opacity (RGB: 132,132,154, alpha: 32)

    • getPrimaryColor

      public AbstractColor getPrimaryColor()
      Returns an animated looping lerp for primary accents. Transitions between blue and purple tones with transparency.
      Specified by:
      getPrimaryColor in class AbstractTheme
      Returns:
      looping lerp from blue to purple

      Returns a very light blue-gray for editable text.
